summary: Tested CMV essential warning sign types (rollover risk, steep hill, downgrade ahead, winding road) and counter-rotate functionality. All CMV warning types implemented correctly. Fixed bug where markers weren't cleared on route cancel.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 1079-1148 - placeCmvWarnings() creates yellow diamond signs with truck SVG icons for STEEP_DOWNGRADE, STEEP_HILL, ROLLOVER_RISK, WINDING_ROAD
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 2973-3147 - CMV elevation grade detection using 3D polyline data with 400m sliding window, haversine distance, bearing calculation
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 3091-3117 - Winding road detection from bearing change frequency (>30° per ~200m)
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 3120-3146 - Rollover risk detection (sharp curve + steep grade >3%)
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 3498-3501 - placeCmvWarnings called in handleNavigate after route drawn
VERIFIED: index.css line 44-47 - .counter-rotate CSS class uses 'rotate: calc(var(--map-rotation, 0deg) * -1)' for upright signs
VERIFIED: All CMV warning marker HTML includes class='counter-rotate' wrapper div and data-testid='cmv-warning-marker' with data-warning-type attribute
FIXED: NavigationView.tsx line 3288-3328 - handleCancelRoute now clears shieldLayerGroupRef to remove all sign markers on route cancel
context_for_next_testing_agent: All CMV warning features implemented and tested. Route from Council Bluffs, IA to Vail, CO produces: 27 highway shields, 3 exit signs, 5 speed limit signs, 10 CMV warnings (4 STEEP_DOWNGRADE, 5 STEEP_HILL, 1 WINDING_ROAD, 0 ROLLOVER_RISK - no sharp curves on this route). All signs use counter-rotate CSS class for upright display. Fixed bug in handleCancelRoute that wasn't clearing shield layer group.

cmv_warning_markers.details: Found 10 CMV warning markers with data-testid='cmv-warning-marker' and data-warning-type attribute. Breakdown: STEEP_DOWNGRADE=4, STEEP_HILL=5, WINDING_ROAD=1, ROLLOVER_RISK=0 (expected - no sharp curves on Vail route)

cmv_warning_types.STEEP_DOWNGRADE: PASS - 4 markers found, yellow diamond with truck on descending slope SVG
cmv_warning_types.STEEP_HILL: PASS - 5 markers found, yellow diamond with truck on ascending slope SVG
cmv_warning_types.WINDING_ROAD: PASS - 1 marker found, yellow diamond with S-curve SVG
cmv_warning_types.ROLLOVER_RISK: PASS (0 expected) - Requires sharp curve + steep grade combination, none on this route

highway_shield_markers.details: Found 27 highway shield markers with data-testid='highway-shield-marker' and direction badges

exit_sign_markers.details: Found 3 exit sign markers with data-testid='exit-sign-marker'

speed_limit_sign_markers.details: Found 5 speed limit sign markers with data-testid='speed-limit-sign-marker'

counter_rotate_css_class.details: Found 120 elements with .counter-rotate class. CSS rule verified: 'rotate: calc(var(--map-rotation, 0deg) * -1)' for upright signs during map rotation

backend_road_shield_endpoint.details: 10/10 pytest tests pass. Returns valid PNG images for interstate, US highway, and state route shields

backend_route_elevation_parameter.details: Route API includes 'elevation' in return parameter for 3D polyline data. Verified in server.ts line 262

markers_cleared_on_route_cancel.details: Fixed handleCancelRoute to call shieldLayerGroupRef.current.clearLayers(). Before: markers remained. After fix: all markers cleared (CMV=0, Shields=0, Exits=0, Speed=0)

app_loads_correctly.details: App loads with splash screen, then login page

guest_login_works.details: Continue as Guest button works, navigates to Command Center

navigation_page_loads_with_map.details: Navigation view shows map with satellite imagery, search input, and controls

route_calculation_works.details: Route from Council Bluffs to Vail calculated successfully: 638.4 mi, 9h 9m

bug_fixed.description: handleCancelRoute function was not clearing shield layer group, causing sign markers to remain on map after route cancellation
bug_fixed.root_cause: handleCancelRoute (line 3288) was missing the call to shieldLayerGroupRef.current.clearLayers() that exists in clearRoute (line 2378)
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Added shieldLayerGroupRef.current.clearLayers() call to handleCancelRoute function and also added routeDistancesRef.current = [] to clear distance data
bug_fixed.verification: Tested route cancel - before fix markers remained (CMV=10, Shields=27, Exits=3, Speed=5), after fix all cleared (CMV=0, Shields=0, Exits=0, Speed=0)
